name: Card surprise (tachy tg)
description:
So while you were walking to your house where you're girlfriend, lora is he spotted a card near a abandoned cardshop when you picked it up, you suddenly realized that the card looks like this

And when you take a look at it more you realized that the robot in the card is tachy from the metal cardbots w series and you know that lora like tachy and fan of it so you decide to take it not knowing it will change your life.

So yeah this was requested by LuigiKid35. And if you want to take requests click here

Also next bot is finally the marvel rivals bot
creator: Briangaming_🎧🔥
